data.content:
### Write Entry Data Structure

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.0.3/filesystem/page.mdx

Defines the structure for writing data to a file or directory within the sandbox.

```APIDOC
## Write Entry Data Structure (WriteEntry)

### Description
Defines the structure for writing data to a filesystem entry in the sandbox.

### Type Declaration
- **data** (string | ArrayBuffer | Blob | ReadableStream) - Required - The content to write.
- **path** (string) - Required - The path of the entry to write to.
```

--------------------------------

### EntryInfo Interface Properties (TypeScript)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.3.0/filesystem/page.mdx

Defines the structure for information about a filesystem object (file or directory) within the sandbox. It includes properties for the object's name and its full path. An optional 'type' property indicates whether it's a file or directory.

```ts
name: string;
path: string;
type?: FileType;
```

--------------------------------

### Directory Creation API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.5.2/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Provides functionality to create directories within the sandbox environment. It can create nested directories if they do not exist.

```APIDOC
## POST /make_dir

### Description
Create a new directory and all directories along the way if needed on the specified path.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/make_dir

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
- None

#### Query Parameters
- **path** (str) - Required - Path to a new directory. For example '/dirA/dirB' when creating 'dirB'.
- **user** (Username) - Optional - Run the operation as this user (defaults to "user").
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "path": "/dirA/dirB",
  "user": "user",
  "request_timeout": 60.0
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **result** (bool) - True if the directory was created, False if the directory already exists

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "result": true
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Create Directory API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.5.0/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Creates a new directory at the specified path, including any necessary parent directories.

```APIDOC
## POST /filesystem/make_dir

### Description
Creates a new directory and any necessary parent directories.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/filesystem/make_dir

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **path** (str) - Required - Path to the new directory. For example, '/dirA/dirB' when creating 'dirB'.
- **user** (Username) - Optional - The user to run the operation as. Defaults to "user".
- **request_timeout** (Optional[float]) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "path": "/path/to/new_directory"
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **created** (bool) - `True` if the directory was created, `False` if the directory already exists.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "created": true
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Create Directory

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v2.1.1/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Creates a new directory at the specified path, including any necessary parent directories.

```APIDOC
## POST /filesystem/make-dir

### Description
Creates a new directory and all necessary parent directories.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/filesystem/make-dir

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **path** (string) - Required - Path to the new directory (e.g., '/dirA/dirB' to create 'dirB').
- **user** (string) - Optional - Username to run the operation as (default: "user").
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **created** (boolean) - `True` if the directory was created, `False` if it already exists.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "created": true
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Filesystem API - List Directory Entries

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.0.6/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Lists all entries (files and directories) within a specified directory.

```APIDOC
## GET /fs/list

### Description
List entries in a directory.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/fs/list

### Query Parameters
- **path** (str) - Required - Path to the directory
- **user** (Username) - Optional - Run the operation as this user. Defaults to `user`.
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **entries** (List[EntryInfo]) - A list of entries in the directory.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "entries": [
    {
      "name": "file1.txt",
      "type": "file",
      "path": "/path/to/directory/file1.txt"
    },
    {
      "name": "subdir",
      "type": "directory",
      "path": "/path/to/directory/subdir"
    }
  ]
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Filesystem - List Directory Contents

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.5.3/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Lists the entries (files and directories) within a specified directory.

```APIDOC
## GET /filesystem/list

### Description
Lists entries in a directory.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/filesystem/list

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **path** (string) - Required - Path to the directory.
- **depth** (integer) - Optional - Depth of the directory to list. Defaults to 1.
- **user** (string) - Optional - Run the operation as this user. Defaults to "user".
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **entries** (array of EntryInfo) - List of entries in the directory.
  - **path** (string) - Path of the entry.
  - **type** (string) - Type of the entry ('file' or 'directory').

#### Response Example
{
  "entries": [
    {
      "path": "/path/to/directory/file1.txt",
      "type": "file"
    },
    {
      "path": "/path/to/directory/subdir",
      "type": "directory"
    }
  ]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Create Directory with Filesystem.makeDir() in TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.2.1/filesystem/page.mdx

The `makeDir` method creates a new directory at the specified path. It can create parent directories if they do not exist. It returns a Promise that resolves to a boolean indicating if the directory was created.

```typescript
const dirCreated = await filesystem.makeDir('/path/to/new/directory');
console.log(dirCreated);
```

--------------------------------

### Create Directory

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.3.4/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Creates a new directory at the specified path. Parent directories will be created if they do not exist.

```APIDOC
## POST /v1/files/make-dir

### Description
Creates a new directory and any necessary parent directories.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/v1/files/make-dir

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **path** (string) - Required - Path for the new directory. For example, '/dirA/dirB' to create 'dirB'.
- **user** (string) - Optional - Username to run the operation as. Defaults to "user".
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **created** (boolean) - `true` if the directory was created, `false` if it already exists.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "created": true
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Create a directory

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v2.1.3/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Creates a new directory at the specified path. Parent directories are created if they do not exist.

```APIDOC
## POST /filesystem/make_dir

### Description
Creates a new directory at the specified path. If parent directories do not exist, they will be created as well.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
`/filesystem/make_dir`

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **path** (str) - Required - The path for the new directory (e.g., '/dirA/dirB' to create 'dirB').
- **user** (str) - Optional - The username to perform the operation as (defaults to 'user').
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **bool** (boolean) - `true` if the directory was created, `false` if the directory already exists.

#### Response Example
```json
true
```
```

--------------------------------

### Filesystem API - List Directory

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.11.0/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Lists the entries (files and directories) within a specified directory in the sandbox.

```APIDOC
## GET /filesystem/list

### Description
List entries in a directory.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/filesystem/list

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **path** (string) - Required - Path to the directory
- **depth** (integer) - Optional - Depth of the directory to list. Defaults to `1`.
- **user** (string) - Optional - Run the operation as this user. Defaults to `user`.
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in **seconds**

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **entries** (array) - List of entries in the directory
  - **entry** (object) - Information about a directory entry
    - **name** (string) - The name of the entry
    - **type** (string) - The type of the entry (`file` or `directory`)
    - **path** (string) - The full path to the entry

### Response Example
{
  "entries": [
    {
      "name": "file1.txt",
      "type": "file",
      "path": "/path/to/directory/file1.txt"
    },
    {
      "name": "subdir",
      "type": "directory",
      "path": "/path/to/directory/subdir"
    }
  ]
}
```

--------------------------------

### Create Directory

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.3.3/sandbox_sync/page.mdx

Creates a new directory at the specified path. Parent directories will be created if they do not exist.

```APIDOC
## POST /filesystem/make-dir

### Description
Creates a new directory and any necessary parent directories.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/filesystem/make-dir

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **path** (str) - Required - Path for the new directory (e.g., '/dirA/dirB' creates 'dirB' inside 'dirA').
- **user** (Username) - Optional - The user to perform the operation as. Defaults to "user".
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "path": "/new/directory/structure"
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **created** (bool) - `True` if the directory was created, `False` if it already exists.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "created": true
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Initialize E2B Sandbox Template with E2B CLI

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/cli/v1.0.0/template/page.mdx

Initializes a new E2B sandbox template by creating a basic e2b.Dockerfile in the root directory. This command helps set up the basic structure for a new template.

```bash
e2b template init [options]
```

--------------------------------

### Filesystem.makeDir()

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.5.1/filesystem/page.mdx

Creates a new directory, including any necessary parent directories, at the specified path.

```APIDOC
## Method: Filesystem.makeDir()

Create a new directory and all directories along the way if needed on the specified path.

### Method

POST (assumed)

### Endpoint

/filesystem/makeDir (assumed)

### Parameters

#### Query Parameters

- **path** (string) - Required - Path to a new directory. For example '/dirA/dirB' when creating 'dirB'.
- **opts** (FilesystemRequestOpts) - Optional - Connection options.

### Returns

`Promise<boolean>` - `true` if the directory was created, `false` if it already exists.
```

--------------------------------

### Filesystem - List Directory

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.1.0/sandbox_async/page.mdx

Lists the entries (files and directories) within a specified directory.

```APIDOC
## GET /filesystem/list

### Description
Lists entries in a directory.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
`/filesystem/list`

### Query Parameters
- **path** (str) - Required - Path to the directory.
- **user** (Username) - Optional - Run the operation as this user (`user` by default).
- **request_timeout** (Optional[float]) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **entries** (List[EntryInfo]) - List of entries in the directory.

#### Response Example
[
  {
    "name": "file1.txt",
    "path": "/path/to/directory/file1.txt",
    "is_directory": false,
    "size": 1024
  },
  {
    "name": "subdir",
    "path": "/path/to/directory/subdir",
    "is_directory": true,
    "size": 0
  }
]
```
